nasb.text: So Pharaoh spoke to Joseph, “In my dream, behold, I was standing on the bank of the Nile;

esv.text: Then Pharaoh said to Joseph, “Behold, in my dream I was standing on the banks of the Nile.

cnv.text: 法老告訴約瑟：“在夢裡我看見我站在河邊。

ccb.text: 法老对约瑟说：“我梦见自己站在尼罗河边，

csbs.text: 法老对约瑟说：“在梦里，看哪，我正站在尼罗河岸。
